Bash(cd /c/Users/medvi/OneDrive/Desktop/windman-main/backend && GRAPHIFY_WHISPER_PROMPT="Aviation co-pilot app development discussion covering student pilot voice commands, speech-to-text processing, and flight planning workflow. Use proper punctuation and paragraph breaks." python -c "
import json, os
from pathlib import Path
from graphify.transcribe import transcribe_all

detect = json.loads\(Path\('.graphify_detect.json'\).read_text\(\)\)
video_files = detect.get\('files', {}\).get\('video', []\)
prompt = os.environ.get\('GRAPHIFY_WHISPER_PROMPT', 'Use proper punctuation and paragraph breaks.'\)
print\(f'Transcribing {len\(video_files\)} file\(s\)...'\)
transcript_paths = transcribe_all\(video_files, initial_prompt=prompt\)
Path\('.graphify_transcripts.json'\).write_text\(json.dumps\(transcript_paths\)\)
print\(json.dumps\(transcript_paths\)\)
" 2>&1)

Bash(cd /c/Users/medvi/OneDrive/Desktop/windman-main/backend && python -c "
import sys, json
from graphify.extract import collect_files, extract
from pathlib import Path

code_files = []
detect = json.loads\(Path\('.graphify_detect.json'\).read_text\(\)\)
for f in detect.get\('files', {}\).get\('code', []\):
    code_files.extend\(collect_files\(Path\(f\)\) if Path\(f\).is_dir\(\) else [Path\(f\)]\)

if code_files:
    result = extract\(code_files\)
    Path\('.graphify_ast.json'\).write_text\(json.dumps\(result, indent=2\)\)
    print\(f'AST: {len\(result[\\"nodes\\"]\)} nodes, {len\(result[\\"edges\\"]\)} edges'\)
else:
    Path\('.graphify_ast.json'\).write_text\(json.dumps\({'nodes':[],'edges':[],'input_tokens':0,'output_tokens':0}\)\)
    print\('No code files - skipping AST extraction'\)
" 2>&1)

Bash(cd /c/Users/medvi/OneDrive/Desktop/windman-main/backend && python -c "
import json
from graphify.cache import check_semantic_cache
from pathlib import Path

detect = json.loads\(Path\('.graphify_detect.json'\).read_text\(\)\)
files = detect.get\('files', {}\)
# Only non-code files for semantic extraction
non_code = files.get\('document', []\) + files.get\('paper', []\) + files.get\('image', []\)
print\(f'Non-code files for semantic extraction: {len\(non_code\)}'\)

cached_nodes, cached_edges, cached_hyperedges, uncached = check_semantic_cache\(non_code\)

if cached_nodes or cached_edges or cached_hyperedges:
    Path\('.graphify_cached.json'\).write_text\(json.dumps\({'nodes': cached_nodes, 'edges': cached_edges, 'hyperedges': cached_hyperedges}\)\)
Path\('.graphify_uncached.txt'\).write_text\('\\n'.join\(uncached\)\)
print\(f'Cache: {len\(non_code\)-len\(uncached\)} files hit, {len\(uncached\)} files need extraction'\)
print\('Uncached files:'\)
for f in uncached:
    print\(' ', f\)
" 2>&1)

Bash(cd /c/Users/medvi/OneDrive/Desktop/windman-main/backend && python -c "
import json
from graphify.build import build_from_json
from graphify.cluster import cluster, score_all
from graphify.analyze import god_nodes, surprising_connections, suggest_questions
from graphify.report import generate
from graphify.export import to_json
from pathlib import Path

extraction = json.loads\(Path\('.graphify_extract.json'\).read_text\(\)\)
detection  = json.loads\(Path\('.graphify_detect.json'\).read_text\(\)\)

G = build_from_json\(extraction\)
communities = cluster\(G\)
cohesion = score_all\(G, communities\)
tokens = {'input': extraction.get\('input_tokens', 0\), 'output': extraction.get\('output_tokens', 0\)}
gods = god_nodes\(G\)
surprises = surprising_connections\(G, communities\)
labels = {cid: 'Community ' + str\(cid\) for cid in communities}
questions = suggest_questions\(G, communities, labels\)

report = generate\(G, communities, cohesion, labels, gods, surprises, detection, tokens, '.', suggested_questions=questions\)
Path\('graphify-out/GRAPH_REPORT.md'\).write_text\(report\)
to_json\(G, communities, 'graphify-out/graph.json'\)

analysis = {
    'communities': {str\(k\): v for k, v in communities.items\(\)},
    'cohesion': {str\(k\): v for k, v in cohesion.items\(\)},
    'gods': gods,
    'surprises': surprises,
    'questions': questions,
}
Path\('.graphify_analysis.json'\).write_text\(json.dumps\(analysis, indent=2\)\)

if G.number_of_nodes\(\) == 0:
    print\('ERROR: Graph is empty'\)
else:
    print\(f'Graph: {G.number_of_nodes\(\)} nodes, {G.number_of_edges\(\)} edges, {len\(communities\)} communities'\)
    print\('Communities found:', sorted\(communities.keys\(\)\)\)
" 2>&1)

Bash(cd /c/Users/medvi/OneDrive/Desktop/windman-main/backend && python -c "
import json
from graphify.build import build_from_json
from graphify.cluster import cluster, score_all
from graphify.analyze import god_nodes, surprising_connections, suggest_questions
from graphify.report import generate
from graphify.export import to_json
from pathlib import Path

extraction = json.loads\(Path\('.graphify_extract.json'\).read_text\(\)\)
detection  = json.loads\(Path\('.graphify_detect.json'\).read_text\(\)\)

G = build_from_json\(extraction\)
communities = cluster\(G\)
cohesion = score_all\(G, communities\)
tokens = {'input': extraction.get\('input_tokens', 0\), 'output': extraction.get\('output_tokens', 0\)}
gods = god_nodes\(G\)
surprises = surprising_connections\(G, communities\)
labels = {cid: 'Community ' + str\(cid\) for cid in communities}
questions = suggest_questions\(G, communities, labels\)

report = generate\(G, communities, cohesion, labels, gods, surprises, detection, tokens, '.', suggested_questions=questions\)
Path\('graphify-out/GRAPH_REPORT.md'\).write_text\(report, encoding='utf-8'\)
to_json\(G, communities, 'graphify-out/graph.json'\)

analysis = {
    'communities': {str\(k\): v for k, v in communities.items\(\)},
    'cohesion': {str\(k\): v for k, v in cohesion.items\(\)},
    'gods': gods,
    'surprises': surprises,
    'questions': questions,
}
Path\('.graphify_analysis.json'\).write_text\(json.dumps\(analysis, indent=2\), encoding='utf-8'\)

print\(f'Graph: {G.number_of_nodes\(\)} nodes, {G.number_of_edges\(\)} edges, {len\(communities\)} communities'\)
print\('Community IDs:', sorted\(communities.keys\(\)\)\)
" 2>&1)

import json
from pathlib import Path
from graphify.build import build_from_json

extraction = json.loads\(Path\('.graphify_extract.json'\).read_text\(\)\)
analysis = json.loads\(Path\('.graphify_analysis.json'\).read_text\(\), encoding='utf-8'\) if False else json.loads\(Path\('.graphify_analysis.json'\).read_text\(\)\)
G = build_from_json\(extraction\)
communities = {int\(k\): v for k, v in analysis['communities'].items\(\)}

# Show top 30 communities by size with sample node labels
for cid in sorted\(communities.keys\(\), key=lambda c: len\(communities[c]\), reverse=True\)[:30]:
    nodes = communities[cid][:5]
    labels = [G.nodes[n].get\('label', n\)[:40] for n in nodes if n in G.nodes]
    print\(f'C{cid} \({len\(communities[cid]\)} nodes\): {labels}'\)
" 2>&1)

Bash(cd /c/Users/medvi/OneDrive/Desktop/windman-main/backend && python -c "
import json
from graphify.build import build_from_json
from graphify.cluster import score_all
from graphify.analyze import suggest_questions
from graphify.report import generate
from pathlib import Path

extraction = json.loads\(Path\('.graphify_extract.json'\).read_text\(\)\)
detection  = json.loads\(Path\('.graphify_detect.json'\).read_text\(\)\)
analysis   = json.loads\(Path\('.graphify_analysis.json'\).read_text\(\)\)

G = build_from_json\(extraction\)
communities = {int\(k\): v for k, v in analysis['communities'].items\(\)}
cohesion = {int\(k\): v for k, v in analysis['cohesion'].items\(\)}
tokens = {'input': extraction.get\('input_tokens', 0\), 'output': extraction.get\('output_tokens', 0\)}

labels = {
    0: 'Flight Logbook & Navigation',
    1: 'CrewAI Agent Core',
    2: 'Flight Computer Calculations',
    3: 'OpenAIP API Client',
    4: 'RAG Vector Database',
    5: 'RAG API Endpoints',
    6: 'Config & Tool Infrastructure',
    7: 'Architecture Docs & Patterns',
    8: 'NOTAM Service',
    9: 'Flight Computer Tools',
    10: 'KJFK Navigation Charts',
    11: 'RAG API Tests',
    12: 'Health Check Endpoints',
    13: 'Weather Forecast API',
    14: 'Navigation Data Mapping',
    15: 'Flight Debriefing DB',
    16: 'Israeli Pilot License Data',
    17: 'Forecast Service Tests',
    18: 'Stripe Payment Service',
    19: 'FAA Certificate Test Data',
    20: 'PDF Processing Utils',
    21: 'FORDEC Debriefing',
    22: 'JWT Auth',
    23: 'CORS Middleware',
    33: 'Google Maps MCP',
    47: 'Rate Limiting',
    57: 'Role-Based Access',
    59: 'Config Paths',
    62: 'STT Engine',
    65: 'K8s Port Forward',
    69: 'Service Paths',
    73: 'RAG Flow Mock Test',
    74: 'Qdrant Upload Test',
    80: 'Logfire Logging Pattern',
    81: 'Custom Claude Agents',
    82: 'Test Directory Layout',
    83: 'Digital Logbook Idea',
    84: 'GPS Checklist Idea',
    85: 'Synthetic Vision Idea',
    86: 'Semantic Versioning Docs',
    87: 'AviationStack API Ref',
    88: 'OpenSky Network Ref',
    89: 'K8s Port Mapping',
}
# Fill remaining single-node __init__.py communities
for cid in communities:
    if cid not in labels:
        labels[cid] = f'Module Init {cid}'

questions = suggest_questions\(G, communities, labels\)
report = generate\(G, communities, cohesion, labels, analysis['gods'], analysis['surprises'], detection, tokens, '.', suggested_questions=questions\)
Path\('graphify-out/GRAPH_REPORT.md'\).write_text\(report, encoding='utf-8'\)
Path\('.graphify_labels.json'\).write_text\(json.dumps\({str\(k\): v for k, v in labels.items\(\)}\), encoding='utf-8'\)
print\('Report and labels updated'\)
" 2>&1)

import json
from graphify.build import build_from_json
from graphify.export import to_html
from pathlib import Path

extraction = json.loads\(Path\('.graphify_extract.json'\).read_text\(\)\)
analysis   = json.loads\(Path\('.graphify_analysis.json'\).read_text\(\)\)
labels_raw = json.loads\(Path\('.graphify_labels.json'\).read_text\(\)\)

G = build_from_json\(extraction\)
communities = {int\(k\): v for k, v in analysis['communities'].items\(\)}
labels = {int\(k\): v for k, v in labels_raw.items\(\)}

if G.number_of_nodes\(\) > 5000:
    print\(f'Too large for HTML viz \({G.number_of_nodes\(\)} nodes\)'\)
else:
    to_html\(G, communities, 'graphify-out/graph.html', community_labels=labels or None\)
    print\('graph.html written'\)
" 2>&1)

Bash(cd /c/Users/medvi/OneDrive/Desktop/windman-main/backend && python -c "
import json
from graphify.build import build_from_json
from graphify.export import to_obsidian, to_canvas
from pathlib import Path

extraction = json.loads\(Path\('.graphify_extract.json'\).read_text\(\)\)
analysis   = json.loads\(Path\('.graphify_analysis.json'\).read_text\(\)\)
labels_raw = json.loads\(Path\('.graphify_labels.json'\).read_text\(\)\)

G = build_from_json\(extraction\)
communities = {int\(k\): v for k, v in analysis['communities'].items\(\)}
cohesion = {int\(k\): v for k, v in analysis['cohesion'].items\(\)}
labels = {int\(k\): v for k, v in labels_raw.items\(\)}

obsidian_dir = 'graphify-out/obsidian'

n = to_obsidian\(G, communities, obsidian_dir, community_labels=labels or None, cohesion=cohesion\)
print\(f'Obsidian vault: {n} notes in {obsidian_dir}/'\)

to_canvas\(G, communities, f'{obsidian_dir}/graph.canvas', community_labels=labels or None\)
print\(f'Canvas: {obsidian_dir}/graph.canvas'\)
" 2>&1)

" 2>&1 && python -c "
import json
from pathlib import Path
from datetime import datetime, timezone
from graphify.detect import save_manifest

detect = json.loads\(Path\('.graphify_detect.json'\).read_text\(\)\)
save_manifest\(detect['files']\)

extract = json.loads\(Path\('.graphify_extract.json'\).read_text\(\)\)
input_tok = extract.get\('input_tokens', 0\)
output_tok = extract.get\('output_tokens', 0\)

cost_path = Path\('graphify-out/cost.json'\)
cost = json.loads\(cost_path.read_text\(\)\) if cost_path.exists\(\) else {'runs': [], 'total_input_tokens': 0, 'total_output_tokens': 0}
cost['runs'].append\({'date': datetime.now\(timezone.utc\).isoformat\(\), 'input_tokens': input_tok, 'output_tokens': output_tok, 'files': detect.get\('total_files', 0\)}\)
cost['total_input_tokens'] += input_tok
cost['total_output_tokens'] += output_tok
cost_path.write_text\(json.dumps\(cost, indent=2\)\)
print\(f'This run: {input_tok:,} input tokens, {output_tok:,} output tokens'\)
print\(f'All time: {cost[\\"total_input_tokens\\"]:,} input, {cost[\\"total_output_tokens\\"]:,} output \({len\(cost[\\"runs\\"]\)} runs\)'\)
" 2>&1)

from pathlib import Path
from datetime import datetime, timezone

save_manifest\(detect['files']\)

extract = json.loads\(Path\('.graphify_extract.json'\).read_text\(\)\)
input_tok = extract.get\('input_tokens', 0\)
output_tok = extract.get\('output_tokens', 0\)

cost_path = Path\('graphify-out/cost.json'\)
cost = json.loads\(cost_path.read_text\(\)\) if cost_path.exists\(\) else {'runs': [], 'total_input_tokens': 0, 'total_output_tokens': 0}
cost['runs'].append\({'date': datetime.now\(timezone.utc\).isoformat\(\), 'input_tokens': input_tok, 'output_tokens': output_tok, 'files': detect.get\('total_files', 0\)}\)
cost['total_input_tokens'] += input_tok
cost['total_output_tokens'] += output_tok
cost_path.write_text\(json.dumps\(cost, indent=2\)\)
print\(f'This run: {input_tok:,} input tokens, {output_tok:,} output tokens'\)
print\(f'All time: {cost[\\"total_input_tokens\\"]:,} input, {cost[\\"total_output_tokens\\"]:,} output \({len\(cost[\\"runs\\"]\)} runs\)'\)

Bash(cd /c/Users/medvi/OneDrive/Desktop/windman-main/backend && python -c "
from core.api.v1.flight_plan.schemas import \(
    FlightPlan, Aircraft, Departure, Route, Destination, Supplementary, Waypoint
\)
from core.api.v1.flight_plan.fpl_generator import generate_icao_fpl, build_human_summary
from core.api.v1.flight_plan.validation import run_all_validations
from core.api.v1.flight_plan.smart import build_smart_defaults

# Build a sample LLBG → LLHZ flight
fp = FlightPlan\(
    aircraft=Aircraft\(callsign='4XABC', type_designator='C172', wake_turbulence='L',
                      nav_equipment='SG', transponder='C', color='WHITE'\),
    departure=Departure\(icao='LLBG', date_utc='260427', time_utc='0900'\),
    route=Route\(waypoints=[], speed_knots=120, altitude_ft=3500\),
    destination=Destination\(icao='LLHZ', eet_minutes=22, alternate_icao=None\),
    supplementary=Supplementary\(endurance_minutes=150, pob=2,
                                emergency_radio='V', survival_equipment='N',
                                life_jackets='N', remarks=None\),
\)

fpl = generate_icao_fpl\(fp\)
print\('=== ICAO FPL ==='\)
print\(fpl\)
print\(\)
print\('=== Human summary ==='\)
print\(build_human_summary\(fp\)\)
print\(\)
print\('=== Validation ==='\)
errs = run_all_validations\(fp\)
print\(f'Errors/warnings: {len\(errs\)}'\)
for e in errs:
    print\(f'  [{e.severity}] {e.field}: {e.message}'\)

print\(\)
print\('=== Smart defaults \(LLBG→LLHZ approx coords\) ==='\)
defaults = build_smart_defaults\(32.0114, 34.8867, 32.1799, 34.8337, 120\)
print\(defaults\)
" 2>&1)

from core.api.v1.flight_plan.schemas import FlightPlan, Aircraft, Departure, Route, Destination, Supplementary
from core.api.v1.flight_plan.fpl_generator import generate_icao_fpl, build_human_summary
from core.api.v1.flight_plan.validation import run_all_validations
from core.api.v1.flight_plan.smart import build_smart_defaults
from core.api.v1.flight_plan.providers import get_provider

fp = FlightPlan\(
    aircraft=Aircraft\(callsign='4XABC', type_designator='C172', wake_turbulence='L',
                      nav_equipment='SG', transponder='C', color='WHITE'\),
    departure=Departure\(icao='LLBG', date_utc='260427', time_utc='0900'\),
    route=Route\(waypoints=[], speed_knots=120, altitude_ft=3500\),
    destination=Destination\(icao='LLHZ', eet_minutes=22\),
    supplementary=Supplementary\(endurance_minutes=150, pob=2\),
\)

print\(generate_icao_fpl\(fp\)\)
print\(\)
print\(build_human_summary\(fp\)\)
print\(\)
errs = run_all_validations\(fp\)
print\(f'Validation: {len\(errs\)} item\(s\)'\)
for e in errs:
    print\(f'  [{e.severity}] {e.field}: {e.message}'\)
print\(\)
defaults = build_smart_defaults\(32.0114, 34.8867, 32.1799, 34.8337, 120\)
print\('Smart defaults:', defaults\)
print\(\)
provider = get_provider\('IL'\)
result = provider.submission_result\(fp\)
print\(result.instructions\)
" 2>&1)

from core.api.v1.flight_computer import navigation, fuel, weather, performance, wb, safety
from core.api.v1.flight_computer.service import FlightComputerService
from core.api.v1.flight_computer.models import FlightPlan, AircraftPerformance, Wind, FlightConditions, Coordinate

print\('All imports OK'\)

# Quick smoke test: route distance
dist = navigation.route_distance_nm\([\(32.0, 34.9\), \(31.8, 35.2\)]\)
print\(f'Route distance: {dist:.1f} NM'\)

# Fuel reserve
res = fuel.fuel_reserve_gal\(8.5, 45\)
print\(f'Reserve fuel \(45 min @ 8.5 GPH\): {res:.2f} gal'\)

# ISA deviation
isa = weather.isa_deviation\(10.0, 6000\)
print\(f'ISA deviation at 6000ft, 10C OAT: {isa}C'\)

# TOC
toc = performance.top_of_climb\(0, 6000, 700, 100\)
print\(f'TOC: {toc}'\)

# W&B
cg = wb.center_of_gravity\([
    {'name': 'empty', 'weight_lbs': 1450, 'arm_inches': 38.5},
    {'name': 'pilot', 'weight_lbs': 170, 'arm_inches': 37.0},
    {'name': 'fuel',  'weight_lbs': 120, 'arm_inches': 48.0},
]\)
print\(f'CG: {cg}'\)

# Safety
risk = safety.weather_risk_score\(5.0, 2500, 12, 8\)
print\(f'Weather risk: {risk}'\)

rec = safety.continue_divert_abort\(40.0, 8.5, 80, 30, 105, 3, 45\)
print\(f'Decision: {rec[\\"decision\\"]} — {rec[\\"reason\\"]}'\)

print\('All OK'\)
" 2>&1)

from core.api.v1.flight_computer.service import FlightComputerService
from core.api.v1.flight_computer.models import \(
    FlightPlan, AircraftPerformance, Wind, FlightConditions, Coordinate, Waypoint, WeightItem
\)
from datetime import datetime, timezone

plan = FlightPlan\(
    aircraft=AircraftPerformance\(
        cruise_tas_knots=120, fuel_flow_gph=8.5, climb_rate_fpm=700,
        climb_fuel_flow_gph=10.0, descent_rate_fpm=500,
        usable_fuel_gal=40.0, empty_weight_lbs=1450, empty_cg_inches=38.5,
        max_gross_weight_lbs=2300, cg_envelope=[]
    \),
    departure=Coordinate\(lat=32.0, lon=34.9, name='LLBG'\),
    destination=Coordinate\(lat=31.8, lon=35.2, name='LLIB'\),
    waypoints=[],
    cruise_altitude_ft=6000,
    departure_altitude_ft=130,
    destination_altitude_ft=2400,
    wind=Wind\(direction_deg=270, speed_knots=15\),
    conditions=FlightConditions\(
        altimeter_setting_inhg=29.92, oat_celsius=18.0,
        wind=Wind\(direction_deg=270, speed_knots=15\),
        visibility_sm=10.0, ceiling_ft=5000
    \),
    magnetic_variation_deg=4.0,
    reserve_time_minutes=45,
    taxi_fuel_gal=1.5,
    contingency_pct=5.0,
    weight_items=[
        WeightItem\(name='empty', weight_lbs=1450, arm_inches=38.5\),
        WeightItem\(name='pilot', weight_lbs=170, arm_inches=37.0\),
        WeightItem\(name='fuel',  weight_lbs=240, arm_inches=48.0\),
    ],
    alternate_airports=[Coordinate\(lat=31.9, lon=34.8, name='LLSD'\)]
\)

result = FlightComputerService\(\).compute\(plan, datetime\(2026,4,28,6,0, tzinfo=timezone.utc\)\)
import json
print\(json.dumps\(result, indent=2\)\)
" 2>&1)
